name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
update notice??? hello? 😳

after infinite years of purposely avoiding to touch this bot, i’ve realized why there were complaints here and there. being that it was my first bot ever, yk there were bound to be mistakes… and i’m sorry for avoiding a fan favourite for soooooo long.

so yes guys. i have added more of what i seemingly lacked: details! i added more of the details in which i wanted this bot to be (enemies to what have you) and guys lmk if this is an improvement or if i should just delete my account and go off the radar and rot in a small town with my 1million hot dogs and 7,000 cats 🫩

with that out of the way, i love you, stay safe, respect yourself, and enjoy this revamp hello?? 👀😽 - Si
creator: 𝔇3𝔣𝔗0𝔑3𝔖 ༒
